# MCEncryptionPreference.none

**Case**

The session should not be encrypted.

## Declaration

```swift
case none
```

## Constants

- **MCEncryptionPreference.optional**: The session prefers to use encryption, but accepts unencrypted connections. A connection uses encryption when all the peers choose either [doc://com.apple.multipeerconnectivity/documentation/MultipeerConnectivity/MCEncryptionPreference/optional] or [doc://com.apple.multipeerconnectivity/documentation/MultipeerConnectivity/MCEncryptionPreference/required]. If some peers choose [doc://com.apple.multipeerconnectivity/documentation/MultipeerConnectivity/MCEncryptionPreference/none], then the session will not be encrypted. For this reason, if some peers running your app can be configured without encryption, you should always assume that the session is unencrypted.
- **MCEncryptionPreference.required**: The session requires encryption.
